xvi    China’s Rise: Development-Oriented Finance and Sustainable Development

The reform and growth of CDB have been closely connected
                                                                                                                    with the reform, opening up, and economic development of China,
                                                                                                                    which have been full of explorations, practices, and difficulties. Lots
                                                                                                                    of bottleneck restrictions are imposed on the market system, infra-
                                                                                                                    structure, and social development in China as a transitional econ-

omy. In these years, CDB has actively explored and developed the
